info.english_meaning: to go to pervade to surround to attack to be pregnant to conceive to glow to shine to throw to eat
info.hindI_arTa: janajAti GeranA AkramaRa karanA garBavatI honA garBaDAraRa karanA camakanA PeMkanA KAnA BakzaRa karanA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: atra vyAptiH ityarTaH DAtuvftti- kzIrataraNgiRI- jE.kA.kf - da. u. vftti - kAtantraSAkawAyanIyezu na dfSyate  ' prajanaH = praTamagarBagrahaRam asanaM = kzepaRam aSanaM = vyAptirityeke ' iti kzIrasvAmI  ' prajananakAntyAsanaKAdanezu ca' iti kASakftsnaDAtupAWe  ' kannaqawIkAyAm AsanArTasya nirdeSAt kASakftsne 'Asana' iti pAWo drazwavyaH  yadvA mUlapAWe pramAdapaWitasyEva wIkAkftA taTA vyAKyAnaM kftaM syAt' iti kA. kf. wIkA ' ajervyaGaYapoH ' (2.4.56) iti sUtraBAzarItyA asya DAtoH ArDaDAtuke nAsti prayogaH iti SabdenduSeKare sTitam  ' vI ityatra IkAropi DAtvantaraM praSlizyate ' iti sidDAntakOmudI  ' kAntigativyAptikzepaprajanaKAdanezu ' iti vopadevaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yadi vaSAM na vindedapi yEva kA cApravItA syAt' (Sa॰brA॰5.5.1.11) apravItA=anApannasattvA=agarBiRI atrArTe praSabdo duzpariharaH tamantareRa tadarTAnavagateH nAnArTezu DAtuzUpasargARAM dyotakatvasyAByupetatvAt
'CandoBirevAsmE paSUn pra janayati …prEva tena vApayati' (tE0 saM0 34930) pravApayati garBaM grAhayati
'uta me vocatAditi sutasome raTavItO na kAmo apa veti me' (f॰5.61.18) ukto'rTaH
'akfzyAyAM BUmO paSuByo vivItAni prayacCet' (kO0 a0 22) vivItaM gocaro gatyaM gavAdanI
'tameva manye nfpatiM janAnAM yaH praTamo dakziRAnAmAvivAya' (f0 101075)
'A no devAnAmupa vetu SaMsaH' (f0 10311) upAvetu upAgacCatu SaMsaH stotavyaH (indraH)
